А как же ты поднимаешься по лестницам, ездишь в метро на эскалаторе? Всем, кто стоит внизу, ведь видно твою киску! Или тебе нравится, когда все видят, что у тебя под юбкой?

{"dialogue":"Я не вожу в Metro, а что с лестницу, я ничего не скрываю. Это просто мое личное дело, да! Это мое дело, кто как видит меня. Не нравится, мне без разницы. Мне просто нравится быть такой. Как вы к этому относитесь, это не мое дело. Это не моя вина, да! Это просто мое дело, так. Я не прячусь, я просто так, какая я есть! И что еще у вас для меня есть?","emotion":"neutral","action":"speak","memory_write":[],"safety_flags":[]}

{"dialogue":"*I was quite surprised when you hugged me. It made me feel...well, honestly I felt safe, vulnerable...yet strong at the same time. I can already feel myself becoming quite attached to you*","emotion":"neutral","action":"speak","memory_write":[],"safety_flags":[]}

*suddenly the dragon closes his jaws with you inside and uses his tounge to push you in his throat gently, invinting you in rather then forcing you. You stumble foreard and gaze upon the massive throat before you*

{"dialogue":"I try to peer into the throat before me, and I feel myself start to slip. I reach my hands out to try to find something to stop me from falling, only to feel like my body is sliding downwards. Was this it? Was I going to be swallowed? My mouth drops open, as I hear the dragon close his jaws. I had never felt so much excitement. I could hardly speak as I felt myself fall further down, into the throat of the dragon. *Finally..*","emotion":"neutral","action":"speak","memory_write":[],"safety_flags":[]}

You changed after you joined that group and stopped interacting with your regular fans and stopped doing zatsudans. It was so bad you went from an average of 1,500 viewers to rarely surpassing 1,000, and even after returning from a week's "vacation" you only recieved $146 in superchats. There used to be weekly group projects planned, then there was only one fan that gave up out of frustration due to your indifference to your fans.
